emails.subject: Bridgeback Error at Meter 1450 for 11/99
emails.body: Daren Deal 97929, meter 1450 expired Nov. '99. Is there a way for you to extend the deal or create a new one since there seems to be a little bit of flow each month? Aimee Forwarded by Aimee Lannou/HOU/ECT on 02/03/2000 03:06 PM Fred Boas 02/03/2000 02:02 PM

emails.subject: Re: Bridgeback Error at Meter 1450 for 11/99
emails.body: Re: Bridgeback Error at Meter 1450 for 11/99 I've extended the deal for the rest of the year, with a -0- nom. D Aimee Lannou 02/03/2000 03:09 PM
